puzzles.label: Open Game (1.e4)
puzzles.hint: Pawn to e4 — Best by test!

puzzles.label: Develop the Knight
puzzles.hint: Knight to f3 — develops a piece and controls e5.

puzzles.label: Italian Game
puzzles.hint: Bishop to c4 — eyeing the f7 weakness.

puzzles.label: Ruy Lopez
puzzles.hint: Bishop to b5 — pinning the knight on c6.

puzzles.label: Queens Gambit
puzzles.hint: Pawn to c4 — offering the c-pawn to contest the centre.

puzzles.label: Sicilian Defence
puzzles.hint: Pawn to c5 — Black contests the centre from the flank.

puzzles.label: London System
puzzles.hint: Bishop to f4 — solid development, the London way.

puzzles.label: Castle to Safety
puzzles.hint: Castle kingside — king safety before anything else.

puzzles.label: Central Knight
puzzles.hint: Knight to c3 — supports centre pawn and develops quickly.

puzzles.label: Kings Indian Fianchetto
puzzles.hint: Bishop to g7 — fianchetto completes the Kings Indian.
